user.title: Step 1 — Binance API Credentials
user.description:
Enter your Binance API Key and Secret.

Setup guide:
{setup_guide}

⚠ Enable 'Spot Trading' ONLY. Never enable withdrawals.

claude.title: Step 2 — Claude API Key

risk.title: Step 3 — Risk Parameters
risk.description:
Configure stop-loss cascade and savings rate.

L1 minimum: {l1_min}%  |  L4 minimum: {l4_min}%  |  Savings max: {savings_max}%

Stop-loss levels must be in order: L1 > L2 > L3 > L4 (all negative).

error.invalid_binance_key: Invalid Binance API key. Check the key in Binance API Management.
error.invalid_binance_secret: Invalid Binance API secret. Regenerate the key in Binance API Management.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_claude_key: Invalid Anthropic API key. Check console.anthropic.com.
error.binance_unknown_error: Unexpected Binance API error. See HA logs for details.
error.claude_unknown_error: Unexpected Claude API error. See HA logs for details.
error.invalid_cascade_order: Stop-loss levels must be in order: L1 > L2 > L3 > L4 (e.g. -3, -5, -8, -15).
error.stop_loss_too_tight: Stop-loss value exceeds the allowed minimum. See description for limits.

abort.already_configured: BController is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

init.title: BController — Risk Parameters
init.description: Update risk parameters. Changes take effect immediately after saving.

error.invalid_cascade_order: Stop-loss levels must be in order: L1 > L2 > L3 > L4.
